test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: deterministic model-level mock-ITacticalUI test covers winner resolution, is wired into the tactical runner/Makefile, and the tactical suite passed with OK (75 tests).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md documents deterministic FTacticalGameMockUITest coverage, mock ITacticalUI use without wx runtime objects, and model-level Milestone 10 validation instead of automated GUI playback.
